div.p: Penetration tester, security researcher, and digital defender — protecting systems, networks, and data from evolving cyber threats. Available for freelance engagements worldwide.
I am a professional cybersecurity expert — specializing in network security, penetration testing, and vulnerability assessment.
From corporate security to individual clients — I work to protect digital assets. I have successfully completed multiple projects in freelancing both locally and internationally.
Full vulnerability assessment on a large e-commerce platform. SQL Injection, XSS and IDOR vulnerabilities identified and reported.
Complete security audit of a mid-sized company network infrastructure with hardening guidelines provided.
Custom Python tool for pentesting that automatically performs subdomain enumeration, port scanning and vulnerability fingerprinting.
Discovered a Critical SSRF vulnerability in a known SaaS platform capable of accessing internal services. Listed in Hall of Fame.
For security audits, penetration testing, or any cybersecurity project, get in touch. Available for freelance and corporate engagements.
